description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in formal attire, featuring a fitted vest over a long-sleeve collared shirt and tailored trousers. The shirt is buttoned up and complemented by a tie, giving a professional and businesslike appearance. The vest is sleeveless and closely fitted, while the trousers are straight-cut and paired with formal shoes. The figure's hair is neatly styled and short, and the face is clean-shaven. The arms are extended outward in a neutral, relaxed pose, and the overall build is average and proportional. The clothing and posture suggest a professional or business context, suitable for urban environments such as offices, streets, or public gatherings.
description: A formally dressed adult male in a vest, shirt, tie, and trousers, standing upright with arms extended. The figure has a neat, short hairstyle and wears formal shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full formal outfit, including the vest, shirt, tie, and trousers, with both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the fitted nature of the vest and trousers, as well as the profile of the face and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the vest, shirt, and trousers, with the arms extended and the back of the head visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the side profile of the face, vest, and trousers.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with a vest, collared shirt, tie, and tailored trousers
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended outward
